title: Totemtastic
description: Adds 3 totems that do unique things, including a way to revive players in hardcore.
body:
## Totemtastic

Adds 4 totems with unique functionality, including a way to revive players in hardcore.

## Items
#### Totems
- Crude Totem of Resurrection 
  
	Revives a dead player in hardcore.
	Early game option. (Does not require a smithing template to craft)
	The revived player will have a *stacking* 20% health debuff as a drawback.
	Must be attuned to the player you are trying to revive.
-  Totem of Resurrection
  
	All of the above, minus the health debuff.
	Mid game option.
- Wormhole Totem
  
	Teleports user to the attuned player when used.
	The target player will be warned when they are being teleported to.
- Recall Totem
  
	Returns the holder to predefined coordinates on use.

#### Totem Crafting
- Totem Cores
  
	Combined with shells and a template at a smithing table to craft totems.
	Made in a crafting table
	Can also be extracted from totems using a knife.
- Totem Shells
  
	Made in a crafting table
	Different totems use different shells
- Totem Templates
  
	Used to create totems by combining cores and shells.
	Found in loot throughout the world
		Undying Template: Woodland Mansion/Rare Evoker drop.
		Resurrection Template: Nether Fortress/Treasure Bastion
		Teleportation Template: Nether Fortress (Rarely)/Stronghold/Ancient Cities

#### Misc
- Glass Vial
  
	Using a knife in the main hand while holding a glass vial in the offhand will fill the vial with the players blood, used to attune totems.
- Knives
  
	All tool tiers, functions as a weapon.
